tasks.label: $(package) Build plugin ZIP
tasks.description: Create slytranslate.zip in the workspace root

tasks.label: $(verified) Verify plugin ZIP
tasks.description: Run the archive checks against slytranslate.zip

tasks.label: $(combine) Build and verify plugin ZIP
tasks.task: SlyTranslate: Build and Verify Plugin ZIP
tasks.description: Build slytranslate.zip and verify the archive contents

tasks.label: $(cloud-upload) Deploy plugin ZIP to Test WordPress (wp-loco)
tasks.task: SlyTranslate: Deploy Plugin ZIP to WordPress Pod
tasks.description: Upload slytranslate.zip into the wp-loco WordPress pod in namespace default

tasks.label: $(rocket) Build and deploy plugin ZIP to Test WordPress (wp-loco)
tasks.task: SlyTranslate: Build and Deploy Plugin ZIP
tasks.description: Build, verify, and deploy slytranslate.zip to the wp-loco WordPress pod

tasks.label: $(cloud-upload) Deploy plugin ZIP to SlyBase WordPress pod
tasks.task: SlyTranslate: Deploy Plugin ZIP to SlyBase WordPress Pod
tasks.description: Upload slytranslate.zip into the SlyBase WordPress pod in namespace websites

tasks.label: $(rocket) Build and deploy plugin ZIP to SlyBase WordPress pod
tasks.task: SlyTranslate: Build and Deploy Plugin ZIP to SlyBase WordPress Pod
tasks.description: Build, verify, and deploy slytranslate.zip to the SlyBase WordPress pod
